data.title: Trinsic Residential Group Announces Minority Investment by Haseko Corporation
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Trinsic Residential Group, a prominent developer of multifamily residential real estate, disclosed a minority investment from Haseko Corporation via its subsidiary, Haseko North America, Inc. This investment marks a significant step in the collaboration between the two entities.

data.description: Fifteen carefully selected pieces highlight the unique design strategies of the country, examining creative solutions to urgent global issues related to living spaces and global environments. The exhibition, Prototype Island, organized by the DesignSingapore Council, commences today at Foro.

data.title: Rznomics Reports Interim Clinical Data for RZ-001 in Hepatocellular Carcinoma at AACR 2026 Demonstrating Encouraging Efficacy and Favorable Safety Profile
data.description: The latest study reported a confirmed Overall Response Rate (ORR) of 38.5% and an unconfirmed ORR of 46.2% based on RECIST criteria. Utilizing mRECIST criteria, the study revealed an ORR of 61.5%, with an impressive Complete Response (CR) rate of 23%. Remarkably, there were no severe (Grade 3 or higher) adverse events attributable to RZ-001 that were observed during the study. These findings emphasize the promising clinical applications of the RNA trans-splicing ribozyme platform technology.

data.title: Twofold Launches Revolutionary THC Spirits Alternative on 4/20, Introducing a New Standard for Modern Drinking

data.title: Mabwell Passes On-site GMP Inspection by Regulatory Authority of PIC/S Member Country (Jordan) for the First Time
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Shanghai, Mabwell (688062.SH), a forward-thinking biopharmaceutical firm with a complete industry chain, revealed that its wholly-owned branch, T-mab, cleared the on-site GMP assessment administered by the Jordan Food and Drug authorities.

data.title: New Innovations in Ultimate Beneficial Owner (UBO) Discovery Drive 51% Growth in APAC Business Verification Volume for Trulioo
data.description: In Bangkok, Trulioo has successfully helped a top social media platform in achieving a significant increase of up to 40% in Ultimate Beneficial Owner (UBO) coverage across the Asia Pacific region. This achievement was made possible through the implementation of Trulioo's advanced UBO Discovery technology.
